subcodes.first_line: O friends of the All-Merciful! This earthly dust-heap is but the dwelling-place of faithless owls and the nest of sightless bats [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان رحمانی این خاکدان فانی منزل جغدان بی وفاست و آشیان خفاشان نابینا
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @many are called but few are chosen, @call to action
